description: Animate a character jump using the sample scene '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz'. Create a parabolic jump trajectory over 24 frames where the character starts at the left side on the ground at frame 1, reaches the peak at the center at frame 12, and lands on the right side at frame 24. Render the animation as a 24-frame PNG sequence with a transparent background to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/jump_arc/'.
